/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/simpleIPC.dir/simpleIPC.cu.o "CMakeFiles/simpleIPC.dir/home/cc/power/GPGPU/script/run_benchmark/build-sm80-source/Common/helper_multiprocess.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/simpleIPC.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o simpleIPC   -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda-12.6/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
